Class ConsulAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.consul.ConsulAutoConfiguration
@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @EnableConfigurationProperties public class ConsulAutoConfiguration extends Object

Spencer Gibb
